Video.summary: Harrison's life is in danger when a double rescue goes horribly wrong.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 10

Video.summary: New Years brings Snoop Dogg, rips rescues, a girl crying wolf and a helicopter search for a missing swimmer.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 02

Video.summary: The lifeguards put their lives on the line in the annual lifeguard challenge.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 07

Video.summary: A Japanese tourist drowns just metres from lifeguards trying to save him. Beardy races to 2 Nepalese men.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 01

Video.summary: Kerrbox disrupts Harries' grand plans to propose to his girlfriend, putting blue paint in his spray tan.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 10

Video.summary: A miscommunication between lifeguards on the radio could cause serious problems in the water.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 09

Video.summary: Lifeguards attend a number of mass rescues. Trainee Harrison is tasked with counting the people on the beach.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 11

Video.summary: A man comes to lifeguards with a deep stab wound. A man is brought to shore with no feeling in his lower body.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 04

Video.summary: Lifeguards perform CPR on a man initially complaining of chest pains who suddenly has a cardiac arrest.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 09

Video.summary: A man assaults women in the surf. Lifeguards take part in a 30 day fitness and diet challenge.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 12

Video.summary: Lifeguards attend a deep water spinal rescue, and try catch a rat that’s been eating cables in their buggies.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 11

Video.summary: Jethro takes on the toughest rescue of his career so far. Waves swamp the lifeguard 4WD buggy.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 06

Video.summary: Lfeguards treat an anaphylactic shock patient for the first time and perform a surprising Christmas rescue.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 03

Video.summary: Lifeguards play a final prank on Harrison. Nicola faces her fear of open water when a boat sinks off Bondi.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 13

Video.summary: A New Years Eve beach event with hundreds of participants leads the group directly into a rip.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 04

Video.summary: Reidy attempts a world record while a girl is blown kilometres out to sea on a paddle board.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 08

Video.summary: Trainee Lachie completes his first big solo rescue. The team farewell one of their most dedicated lifeguards.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 08

Video.summary: New Years Eve brings massive crowds. Reidy and Azza race to a man who’s dislocated his shoulder in the water.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 04

Video.summary: The surf club rescue boat collides with a reef. A boy howls in pain, suffering a mystery stomach illness.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 03

Video.summary: New team members are thrown in the deep end. Boo and Lachie embark on a mass rescue.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 03

Video.summary: Jackson administers the EpiPen for anaphylactic shock and Chase and Max go fishing on jetskis.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 07

Video.summary: Tommy faces seaweed perils on the jetski. Chase and Will rush north on the jetski for a cliff fall.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 05

Video.summary: Borders open, tourists flood Bondi. Chase explores a shark colony with a local diver.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 06

Video.summary: Spotlights illuminate World Pride Beach Party with 15,010 revelers. Hoppo marks 30 years on the beach.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 11

Video.summary: Jack and Azza aid a perplexing surfer. Maxi enforces rules in rescues, facing unprecedented challenges later.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 02

Video.summary: Concerns rise over a missing man and the Annual race sparks controversy as a lifeguard organizes some "help".
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 08

Video.summary: An elderly lady suffers a seizure. A bizarre injury occurs involving a dog and a man's wounded manhood.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 09

Video.summary: Chappo rushes in for a life and death rescue in the monster swells, but things don’t go as planned.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 04

Video.summary: Lifeguards deal with a missing boy and two friends - one dislocates his hip, the other has a seizure.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 07

Video.summary: Julie learns the ropes on Bondi. A man confronts a photographer taking pictures of his topless girlfriend.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 08

Video.summary: Yatesy attempts to rescue an inexperienced surfer. After shark sightings, the lifeguards test new technology.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 11

Video.summary: A large bull shark prompts lifeguards to sound the alarm, clearing thousands of swimmers from the water.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 01

Video.summary: A mass rescue unfolds, Hoppo ties the knot, and trainees Glick and Jethro get a final chance to impress.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 13

Video.summary: As lifeguards try bring back a woman found lifeless between the flags, her mentally impaired son arrives.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 02

Video.summary: Nicola attempts to rescue a bodyboarder in his 70s. A tragic spinal injury leaves the lifeguards in shock.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 12

Video.summary: Jethro rescues a man more than double his size, then accidentally locks himself in the lifeguard tower.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 03

Video.summary: New trainee Ryan struggles with the megaphone. Jethro hits it off with a pair of drag queens.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 01

Video.summary: A 2 year old girl is trapped in a locked car. Lifeguards chase a bag thief. Swimmers go under after hours.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 08

Video.summary: Heidi Klum visits Bondi for a photoshoot. Harrison faces 3 drowning people. Surgery on a dislocated knee.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 07

Video.summary: Bluebottles attack Bondi. Mouse handles a missing boy, a dislocated shoulder, and a drug overdose.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 09

Video.summary: Lifeguards search for a couple who were washed off rocks. Joel rescues a family of four in the flagged area.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 06

Video.summary: Monks go missing, a bluebottle sting turns serious and a young cancer patient becomes "lifeguard for the day".
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 07

Video.summary: A body is reported to lifeguards. Stormy weather brings a missing kayaker. Max McGuigan's first rescue.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 02

Video.summary: A flasher's reported. Will and Bagus do continuous rescues. Jethro and Chase test a homemade throne in the surf.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 08

Video.summary: Surfer seeks refuge from angry beachgoer. Spiderman visits the beach. Lifeguard teams compete in a race.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 07

Video.summary: Bondi reopens. Lifeguards rescue a paraglider and try to fix the buggy. Lifeguard Max Milligan's first rescue.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 01

Video.summary: Hoppo and Evo face rescues on summer's hottest day. Newbies Matt and Noah are tested as their radio dies.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 05

Video.summary: Lifeguards aid surfers and chase an odd beach intruder. Australia Day brings Harrison's toughest rescue yet.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 04
